actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Error_Updating_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Error Updating Lab Order

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Lab_Order_Didn_t_Create_Info
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Lab Order Didn't Create - Info

value.stringValue: No Lab Order Was Created Because: {!Create_Lab_Order.txt_ErrorMessage}

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_Lab_Order_Didn_t_Create_Info_Multi
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - Lab Order Didn't Create - Info

value.stringValue: No Lab Order Was Created Because: {!Create_Lab_Order_Multi.txt_ErrorMessage}

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_No_Serviceable_Items_Found
actionCalls.label: Log - Failed - No Serviceable Items Found

value.stringValue: No Serviceable Items Found. No Lab Order Created.
Record Trigger - Opportunity - Create Lab Order Flow Started
Kit Id Present and lab Provider Populated. Setting Opportunity Stage to Pending Results

actionCalls.name: Log_Kit_Id_Present_Lab_Provider_Not_Populated
actionCalls.label: Log - Kit Id Present Lab Provider Not Populated

value.stringValue: Kit Id Present but Lab Provider is not populated. Setting Opportunity Status to Lab Provider Missing
Lab Provider on the Opportunity set to "In Person" since the product is PGT and does not require shipping
No Kit Id. Setting Opportunity status to Kit Id Missing

actionCalls.name: Log_No_Lab_Orders_to_Update
actionCalls.label: Log - No Lab Orders to Update

actionCalls.name: Log_No_Lab_Provider_Found_for_Service
actionCalls.label: Log - No Lab Provider Found for Service

value.stringValue: No Lab Provider was found for this opportunity.
The Campaign tied to the Opportunity doesn't have a specific lab provider, we will continue to dynamically select a lab provider.

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_Lab_Order_Created_Successfully
actionCalls.label: Log - Success - Lab Order Created Successfully

actionCalls.name: Log_Success_Lab_Order_Created_Successfully_Multi
actionCalls.label: Log - Success - Lab Order Created Successfully

actionCalls.name: Log_Successfully_Created_Collection_of_serviceable_items
actionCalls.label: Log Successfully Created Collection of serviceable items

value.stringValue: Successfully Created Collection of serviceable items

assignments.name: Add_Lab_Order_To_Update_Collection
assignments.label: Add Lab Order To Update Collection

assignments.name: Add_Lab_Order_To_Update_Collection_Multi
assignments.label: Add Lab Order To Update Collection

assignments.name: Assign_Output_Values_Lab_Order_Created
assignments.label: Assign Output Values - Lab Order Created

assignments.name: Assign_Output_Values_Lab_Order_Created_Multi
assignments.label: Assign Output Values - Lab Order Created

assignments.description: Assign validated and formatted address to the Opportunity
assignments.name: Assign_Validated_Address_to_Opportunity
assignments.label: Assign Validated Address to Opportunity

assignments.description: Counter used to determine if we need to mark Do Not Send Email as True
assignments.name: Increase_Counter
assignments.label: Increase Counter

assignments.name: Set_Do_Not_Send_Email_as_True
assignments.label: Set Do Not Send Email as True

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Status_Invalid_Address
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Status - Invalid Address

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Status_Invalid_Address_Multi
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Status - Invalid Address

assignments.description: Use the Camapigns Specified Lab Provider to set the Opportunity Lab Provider
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Provider_Campaign
assignments.label: Set Lab Provider - Campaign

assignments.name: Set_Opp_Status_Lab_Provider_Missing
assignments.label: Set Opp Status - Lab Provider Missing

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Stage_Shipping_Address_Invalid
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Stage - Shipping Address Invalid

assignments.name: Set_Oppty_Stage_Kit_Id_Present
assignments.label: Set Oppty Stage - Kit Id Present

assignments.name: Set_Oppty_Stage_No_Kit_Id_Present
assignments.label: Set Oppty Stage - No Kit Id Present

decisions.name: Do_we_have_multiple_Precision_Supplements
decisions.label: Do we have multiple Precision Supplements

decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_mark_Do_Not_Send_as_True
decisions.label: Do we need to mark Do Not Send as True

decisions.description: If It has a Lab Provider specified we will use that Lab Provider
decisions.name: Does_Campaign_Have_Lab_Provider_Set
decisions.label: Does Campaign Have Lab Provider Set
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Lab Provider Set On Campaign

decisions.description: Depending on if the product is set to ship or not we will set the stage depending on this
decisions.name: Does_Kit_Need_Shipped
decisions.label: Does Kit Need Shipped

decisions.description: Check if the Opportunity Product is Precision Genetic Test Product. If YES we still need to create the Lab Order
decisions.name: Is_it_a_Precision_Genetic_Test_Product
decisions.label: Is it a Precision Genetic Test Product

decisions.description: We need to check if the Kit Id is filled in or not as we don't want to send to the lab if there is no kit id
decisions.name: Is_Kit_Id_Filled_In
decisions.label: Is Kit Id Filled In

decisions.description: We only need to update if we have lab orders to update. If there is nothing then we can skip this.
decisions.name: Was_Add_Lab_Order_to_Update_Collection_Visited
decisions.label: Was Add Lab Order to Update Collection Visited

rules.name: Add_Lab_Order_to_Update_Collection_Visited
rules.label: Add Lab Order to Update Collection Visited

decisions.description: Here we check if we failed address validation and set the Lab Order Status
decisions.name: Was_Invalid_Address_Visited
decisions.label: Was Invalid Address Visited

decisions.description: Here we check if we failed address validation and set the Lab Order Status
decisions.name: Was_Invalid_Address_Visited_Multi
decisions.label: Was Invalid Address Visited

decisions.description: If we set a lab provider then we will update the last used date to ensure proper round robin and no one is being skipped when there is an error
decisions.name: Was_Lab_Provider_Set
decisions.label: Was Lab Provider Set

decisions.name: Was_Successful_Create_Collection_of_Servicable_Items
decisions.label: Was Successful - Create Collection of Servicable Items

decisions.description: If the request type is a LAB then we want to keep the stage where it is at.
decisions.name: What_is_the_Request_Type
decisions.label: What is the Request Type

Flow.description: This automation will create the lab order based on the opportunity details and from there there is a record trigger on the Lab Order to submit to the API. We split it up to allow the future many lab orders on one Opportunity.

formulas.description: returns state name converted to abbreviated upper case form
formulas.name: form_txtStateName
formulas.expression: CASE( UPPER({!$Record.Shipping_State__c}), "ALABAMA", "AL", "ALASKA", "AK", "ARIZONA", "AZ", "ARKANSAS", "AR", "CALIFORNIA", "CA", "COLORADO", "CO", "CONNECTICUT", "CT", "DELAWARE", "DE", "FLORIDA", "FL", "GEORGIA", "GA", "HAWAII", "HI", "IDAHO", "ID", "ILLINOIS", "IL", "INDIANA", "IN", "IOWA", "IA", "KANSAS", "KS", "KENTUCKY", "KY", "LOUISIANA", "LA", "MAINE", "ME", "MARYLAND", "MD", "MASSACHUSETTS", "MA", "MICHIGAN", "MI", "MINNESOTA", "MN", "MISSISSIPPI", "MS", "MISSOURI", "MO", "MONTANA", "MT", "NEBRASKA", "NE", "NEVADA", "NV", "NEW HAMPSHIRE", "NH", "NEW JERSEY", "NJ", "NEW MEXICO", "NM", "NEW YORK", "NY", "NORTH CAROLINA", "NC", "NORTH DAKOTA", "ND", "OHIO", "OH", "OKLAHOMA", "OK", "OREGON", "OR", "PENNSYLVANIA", "PA", "RHODE ISLAND", "RI", "SOUTH CAROLINA", "SC", "SOUTH DAKOTA", "SD", "TENNESSEE", "TN", "TEXAS", "TX", "UTAH", "UT", "VERMONT", "VT", "VIRGINIA", "VA", "WASHINGTON", "WA", "WEST VIRGINIA", "WV", "WISCONSIN", "WI", "WYOMING", "WY", UPPER({!$Record.Shipping_State__c}) )

Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Opportunity - Submit Lab Order {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Opportunity - Create Lab Order

recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Provider_Last_Used_Date
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Provider Last Used Date

subflows.name: Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Create_Collection_of_Serviceable_Items_and_Their_Lab_SKU_s
subflows.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Create Collection of Serviceable Items and Their Lab SKU's

subflows.name: Autolaunch_Lab_Order_Get_Request_Type
subflows.label: Autolaunch - Lab Order - Get Request Type

subflows.name: Set_Lab_Provider_In_Person_PGT
subflows.label: Set Lab Provider In Person PGT

textTemplates.description: Body of the email that is sent out to account owner in case there are no lab providers
textTemplates.name: txt_EmailBody_UnsupportedState
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!$Record.Account.Owner.FirstName},
We need to let you know about an issue with a recent attempt by {!$Record.Account.FirstName} to order a Genetic Test through your account. Unfortunately, we can't process this order because the patient's location isn't covered by our current lab services.
What Happened: A patient tried to buy a Genetic Test. Their location is outside our service areas. We can't complete the order right now.
For more information and guidance on this situation, please see our detailed guide here: View Our Guide.
Order Details: {!txt_RecordLink} ___________________________________________________ Sent From Salesforce Automation - Do Not Reply

textTemplates.name: txt_ValidateShippingAddress_ErrorMessage

variables.description: Counts the number of results from the filtered array
variables.name: num_FilterResultCount
